title: About Me
text: Hello! My name is Raye, a masters student studying Business Analytics at the Paul Merage School of Business, University of California, Irvine. I am passionate about data science and its applications in solving real-world problems. With a background in computer science and business analytics, I have developed a strong foundation in data analysis, machine learning, and statistical modeling.
